items.title: Spain luxury hotel scammer booked rooms for one cent, police say
items.dek: Police arrest a 20-year-old suspected of defrauding a luxury Madrid hotel of more than €20,000 by manipulating an online payment system.
items.body: Police arrest a 20-year-old suspected of defrauding a luxury Madrid hotel of more than €20,000 by manipulating an online payment system.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Met Police making 'initial inquiries' into Andrew protection officers

items.title: Benfica midfielder denies racially abusing Vinicius after Real Madrid match halted
items.dek: Benfica claim there is a "defamation campaign" against Gianluca Prestianni as Uefa launch an investigation into claims he racially abused Real Madrid's Vinicius
items.body: Benfica claim there is a "defamation campaign" against Gianluca Prestianni as Uefa launch an investigation into claims he racially abused Real Madrid's Vinicius Jr.
items.author: IriLine Desk
